sql:
SELECT  src_protocol,
                src_port,
                dst_protocol,
                dst_port,
                packet_bytes,
                rank_order
        FROM    ( SELECT src_protocol,
                        src_port,
                        dst_protocol,
                        dst_port,
                        SUM(packet_bytes) packet_bytes ,
                        row_number() over (ORDER BY
                        CASE
                                WHEN src_protocol IS NULL
                                AND     dst_protocol IS NULL
                                THEN 0
                                ELSE 2
                        END DESC, SUM(packet_bytes) DESC) rank_order
                FROM    gather.tb_mdb_sflow_traffic_day dt
                WHERE   1=1
                        AND dt.collect_timestamp   <=   CURRENT_DATE 
                        AND dt.collect_timestamp   >=   CURRENT_DATE - interval '5 days'
                            AND src_port = '111'
                GROUP BY src_protocol,
                        src_port,
                        dst_protocol,
                        dst_port ) dt
                WHERE   1=1
                    AND rank_order   <   101
            LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0
